summary: Responsive shell primitives are in place, and the shared layout layer now handles wrapping, spacing, and touch-friendly action density.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Shared responsive utility classes exist
checks.expected: Responsive utility classes for shell, actions, metadata rows, mobile nav, and wrapped code blocks exist
checks.actual: styles.css now defines responsive utility classes for the shared shell and mobile-safe content wrapping.

checks.name: CHECK-02: Shared primitives consume the responsive classes
checks.expected: Shared UI primitives are wired to the new responsive CSS layer
checks.actual: ActionBar, KeyValueRow, PageHeader, AppLayout, and AppHeader all consume the new responsive class hooks.
